one_time_description: Forgiveness of BC Treaty Commission loan by the Government of Canada
economic_notes: Nation holds 25% interest in Hayu Fishing LP and 25% of Hayu Fishing Ltd, both accounted for using modified equity method. COVID-19 pandemic noted as subsequent event with uncertain financial impact.
notes: Fiscal year 2020 (ended March 31, 2020). Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' in Nanaimo, BC. Prior year (2019) figures restated for two errors: Province of BC revenue overstated by $500,000 and 2018 CMHC accounts receivable overstated by $51,715. Major one-time item: $2,222,601 forgiveness of BC Treaty Commission loan by Government of Canada. Two entities (Hayu Fishing LP and Hayu Fishing Ltd) accounted for using modified equity method and excluded from consolidation. ISC funding flows indirectly through Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council per economic dependence note. Balance sheet details (accounts receivable, current liabilities, deferred revenue, restricted cash) not fully extractable from text provided. Segment schedules show Operations $5,476,733, Enterprise $14,835, Social Housing $159,359, Treaty $0. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event.
